name: Mini Corndogs
recipeInstructions:
Mini Corndogs
1. Combine flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl.
2. With a pastry blender, cut vegetable shortening into the flour mixture until there are fine crumbs.
3. Add egg and milk to the flour mixture and blend well.
4. Pour vegetable oil to a 2-inch depth in a deep fryer or large saucepan. Heat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Pat each frankfurter dry with paper towels.
6. Insert a toothpick into the center of each frankfurter.
7. Dip each frankfurter first into the batter and then into the hot oil until golden brown.
8. Drain on paper towels.
